posts.title: Airtable + Vue.js for Static Websites
posts.summary: Guide demonstrating how to integrate Airtable's collaborative spreadsheet with Vue.js and Axios to display JSON data in Bootstrap tables on static websites.

posts.title: Stripe Sigma: Deleted code has no bugs.
posts.summary: Case study on replacing custom ETL processes and Amazon Redshift infrastructure with Stripe Sigma for SQL-based analytics and reporting.

posts.title: Handling Sales Tax with Laravel Cashier
posts.summary: Technical tutorial for integrating TaxJar's sales tax API with Laravel Cashier to automatically calculate and apply tax rates to subscriptions and charges.

posts.title: Address Validation APIs and Plugins
posts.summary: Comprehensive comparison of address validation services including Shippo, Lob, UPS, and SmartyStreets, plus eCommerce plugins for popular platforms.

posts.title: Hello, Open Source!
posts.summary: Overview of the persisted_cache Ruby gem that enables reliable cached data by storing query results in a database to prevent timeout failures.

posts.title: Nexus Regions
posts.summary: Introduction to TaxJar's nexus regions API endpoint that allows developers to dynamically retrieve their configured sales tax nexus states.
